datasets.name: ADAE
datasets.label: Adverse Event Analysis Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per AE per subject

datasets.name: ADLB
datasets.label: Laboratory Analysis Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per param per visit

datasets.name: ADVS
datasets.label: Vital Signs Analysis Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per param per visit

datasets.name: ADEX
datasets.label: Exposure Analysis Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per param

datasets.name: ADQSADAS
datasets.label: ADAS-Cog(11) Questionnaire Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per visit

datasets.name: ADQSCIBC
datasets.label: CIBIC+ Questionnaire Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per visit

datasets.name: ADQSNPIX
datasets.label: NPI-X Questionnaire Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per param per visit

datasets.name: ADCM
datasets.label: Concomitant Medication Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per medication per subject

datasets.name: ADTTE
datasets.label: Time-to-Event Analysis Dataset
datasets.structure: One row per subject per TTE param

summary: Generated 10 ADaM datasets with R scripts from SDTM source data for CDISCPILOT01.
